---
title: "Francis Heathcote Wilson"
---

## Francis Heathcote Wilson

**Dates:** (b.1848/9-1886)

### Description

son of the Rev. Robert Francis Wilson

### Biography

graduated Oxford, barrister, married Annie C. G. ---  (b.1851/2); collected stamps as a little boy.  [Vital Records, 1861, 1871, 1881 census].

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 18 1863. 
- Letter from Aug 6th [1862]
- Letter from Jany 10th 1861 
- Letter from Decr 14th [1853]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
